latest.title: Essentials: The Biology of Aggression, Mating & Arousal | Dr. David Anderson
latest.desc: In this Huberman Lab Essentials episode, my guest is Dr. David Anderson, PhD, a professor of biology at the California Institute of Technology (Caltech) and an investigator at the Howard Hughes Medical Institute (HHMI). latest.title: Hawaii Trip Turns Into Alleged Murder Plot
latest.desc:
Hawaii doctor Gerhardt Konig took his wife, Arielle Konig, on a hike on the Pali Puka Trail, where he allegedly tried to kill her. Today, I’ll break down the case and the red flags you should be looking for.

latest.title: #651 - Ella Langley
latest.desc:
Ella Langley is a country singer-songwriter from Hope Hull, Alabama. Her new album “Dandelion” is out this Friday April 10th wherever you stream music. 

Ella joins Theo to talk about growing up in a hippie Baptist family, the stars she looked up to as she found her way in Nashville, and what she thinks of all the alternate lyrics to “Choosin’ Texas.”

Ella Langley: https://www.instagram.com/ellal
